title: Knowledge Tracing
summary: Generate static learning trajectory insights from a selected course so the input-to-output flow is easy to see.
emptyOutputText: Select a course and generate insights to see the interpreted learning trajectory.
timelineSummary: Students showed steady improvement from Week 1 to Week 4. A noticeable drop occurred in Week 5, followed by gradual recovery in Weeks 6-8.
keyInsights: Performance declined in Week 5, indicating difficulty with new material.
High engagement but lower mastery suggests conceptual confusion.
Recovery after Week 6 suggests students adapted to the topic.
teachingSuggestions: Revisit Week 5 content with additional examples.
Introduce visual explanations for complex topics.
Add a short formative quiz before Week 6.
